event_notes: Source venue label: Lake Sammamish Pkwy exit, south to park entrance.
event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization follow-up 2026-03-21 merged duplicate event e7ff87bf-f03c-5e9d-b43b-7ff178bab439 ("Marymoor Park, Redmond. WIOL Event #2. Take SR 520 east"). Reason: rollover duplicate. Notes: The November 1995 issue scheduled the Jan. 14 WIOL event for 1996, not 1995, and the same event was later re-ingested from 1996-01.
